description_long: This is an octagonal fighting cage, commonly known as the UFC Octagon, used for mixed martial arts competitions. The structure features a raised platform with a light blue mat, surrounded by black metal fencing and padded posts for safety. The mat is emblazoned with the UFC logo and various sponsor graphics, while the perimeter is reinforced with a thick, black base. The mesh fencing is supported by eight sturdy posts, each capped with padding to prevent injury. The interior is spacious and unobstructed, designed to accommodate two fighters and referees. The overall construction is robust, prioritizing both visibility for spectators and safety for participants.
description: An octagonal fighting cage with black mesh fencing, padded posts, and a light blue mat featuring the UFC logo and sponsor graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the UFC logo centered on the mat, with the octagonal black mesh fence and padded posts clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mesh fencing and the thick, black base, with sponsor graphics partially visible on the mat.
description_view_2: Rear angled view showing the octagonal shape, mesh fencing, and the unobstructed interior of the fighting area.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the padded posts, mesh fencing, and the central UFC logo on the mat.
